name: node-interface-demo
description: Local-first node-based media workflow desktop app.
author: Rusty Meadows

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,electron-build,electron "vite" "tsup --config tsup.config.ts --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/electron/main.cjs dist/electron/preload.cjs dist/electron/worker.cjs && NODE_ENV=development ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electronmon dist/electron/main.cjs"
scripts.smoke:electron: npm run build && node --import tsx scripts/electron-smoke.ts
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dir zip --arm64
scripts.smoke:packaged:mac: npm run package:mac && node --import tsx scripts/packaged-mac-smoke.ts
scripts.verify:mac-lifecycle: npm run smoke:packaged:mac && node --import tsx scripts/print-mac-artifacts.ts
